{{ $current := . }} {{ $root := .Site.Home }} {{ $isRef := eq $current.Params.product "crds" }} {{/* Home + top-level regular pages + sections, ordered by weight. The home page itself is excluded from the list (the sidebar brand links to it). */}} {{ $allItems := (slice $root | append $root.RegularPages | append $root.Sections).ByWeight }}
{{ if $isRef }} {{/* ── Reference tab: the API reference and its CRD kinds ── */}} {{ range $allItems }} {{ if eq .Params.product "crds" }} {{ $ref := . }} {{ $kinds := slice }} {{ range $plural, $dir := $.Site.Data.apis.crds }} {{ if $dir.definition }}{{ $kinds = $kinds | append $dir.definition.spec.names.kind }}{{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ $ref.Title }} {{ with $kinds }}
{{ range (sort .) }} {{ . }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ else }} {{/* ── Documentation tab: every non-reference section and page ── */}} {{ range $allItems }} {{ if and (ne . $root) (ne .Params.product "crds") (not .Params.tocHidden) }} {{ if .IsSection }} {{ $section := . }}
{{/* Non-clickable text label; content lives in the sub-pages below. */}}
{{ .Params.navLabel | default .Title }}
{{/* Sections with real landing content expose it as a first child. */}} {{ with .Params.navLanding }} {{ . }} {{ end }} {{ range $section.Pages.ByWeight }} {{ if not .Params.tocHidden }} {{ .Title }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
{{ else }} {{/* Standalone top-level page (e.g. Concepts): render like a section — a label with the page as its single entry — so it matches. */}}
{{ .Params.navLabel | default .Title }}
{{ .Params.linkTitle | default .Title }}
{{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }} {{ end }}
